name: Christopher Guest
description: British-American screenwriter, comedian, musician, director, and actor (born 1948)
abstract: Christopher Haden-Guest, 5th Baron Haden-Guest (born February 5, 1948), known professionally as Christopher Guest, is an American-British actor, comedian, screenwriter and director. Guest has written, directed, and starred in his series of comedy films shot in mockumentary style.

concerts.label: Toyota Comedy Festival: Spinal Tap: Back from the Dead
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Frishberg
about_quotes.evidence: I like Christopher Guest and Harry Shearer... Yeah Christopher Guest is one of my heroes I guess.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Frishberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001
